Who It's For

Who Is the Managed AI Engineer Model Built For?

Growing Startups

Need AI velocity without building a full in-house team. Get an engineer embedded immediately.

Enterprises Augmenting Teams

Your team has direction but needs specialist AI execution. We slot in without friction.

CTOs & Heads of Engineering

Want reliable AI delivery without managing freelancers, agencies, or offshore vendors.

How It Works

How Does the Managed AI Engineer Process Work?

01Day 1

Brief Your Needs

Fill a 5-minute intake form. A Delivery Lead contacts you within 24 hours to scope your requirements, preferred stack, and timeline.

  • 5-minute async intake
  • Delivery Lead assigned same day
  • Stack & timezone matched
02Days 2–3

Meet Your Engineer

We surface a curated shortlist of Tier-1 AI engineers matched to your domain. You meet, align on sprint goals, and sign off on a milestone plan.

  • Curated match — not a marketplace
  • Live intro call included
  • Milestone plan agreed upfront
03Week 1 onwards

Sprint & Deliver

Your engineer works in focused sprints. A Engagement Manager audits every milestone output. You get working, production-ready AI — not decks, not promises.

  • Weekly milestone check-ins
  • Engagement Manager quality audit
  • Two-week risk-free trial

What's Included

What's Included in a Managed AI Engineer Engagement?

Tier-1 Vetted Builder

Every builder passes a rigorous 5-stage technical vetting — coding, system design, AI depth, and live delivery simulation.

Engagement Manager Oversight

A senior Kovil AI lead audits every milestone before it reaches you. No surprises, no silent drift.

Sprint-Based Delivery

Work happens in structured weekly sprints with clear deliverables. Not open-ended hours billed to a ticket queue.

Timezone Matched

We match your builder to overlap with your core working hours — real-time collaboration, not async delays.

Progress Dashboard

View sprint goals, completed work, and upcoming milestones in one place. Full visibility at all times.

AI Domain Depth

Builders specialise across LLMs, RAG pipelines, voice AI, agent frameworks, and MLOps — not generalist developers.

What to Expect

What Should You Expect When Hiring a Managed AI Engineer?

Day 1
Day 1

Submit Your Brief

Fill a 5-minute intake form. A Delivery Lead calls you within 24 hours to scope requirements, preferred stack, and timeline.

Day 2–3
Day 2–3

Meet Your Shortlist

We surface 2–3 hand-picked engineers matched to your domain. You review profiles, join intro calls, and choose your fit.

Day 3–4
Day 3–4

Milestone Plan Locked

You and your engineer agree a sprint plan — clear deliverables, timelines, and success criteria — before any work begins.

Week 1+
Week 1+

Sprint & Deliver

Your engineer works in focused sprints. Your Engagement Manager audits every output. You review at each milestone checkpoint.

Ongoing
Ongoing

Scale or Wind Down

Add engineers, extend sprints, or wind down — no lock-in. You stay because it's working, not because you're contracted.
